category_sources: Official Matroska page https://www.matroska.org/downloads/mkvalidator.html describes mkvalidator as a command-line verifier for Matroska and WebM files.
source_facts.description says mkvalidator verifies Matroska and WebM files for spec conformance.
display_name_sources: Official Matroska page https://www.matroska.org/downloads/mkvalidator.html uses the heading mkvalidator.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Matroska mkvalidator page and the best official documentation surface for this tool.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Matroska sources identify release source packages and general Git/SVN repository locations, but no dedicated official mkvalidator source-control project URL was verified.
tags_sources: Official Matroska page https://www.matroska.org/downloads/mkvalidator.html identifies it as a command-line conformance checker.
